response.justification: Candidate is a strong full-stack software developer with web, mobile, and some embedded experience, but the role requires deep hardware/SoC expertise, AI accelerator knowledge, and performance architecture skills that are entirely absent from the resume. No evidence of SoC/IP modeling, deep neural network optimization, GPU architecture, SIMD/MIMD work, or hardware-software co-design. Educational background (BS in CS) without the specialized hardware focus, and no PhD/MS in a relevant hardware field.
strengths: Long software engineering tenure with senior/staff titles
Some low-level experience with C/C++ at National Instruments and DLang systems work
Experience with high-throughput, low-latency systems at Dunnhumby
concerns: No SoC/IP modeling, hardware architecture, or AI accelerator experience
No deep learning, GPU, or SIMD/MIMD background
Profile is full-stack web/product engineering, not hardware performance architecture

key_factors.factor: No AI accelerator or DNN optimization background
